ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the club is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the club */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the club */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email of the head coach */,
  "coach_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medal_counts" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal count entry */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the medal count belongs to */,
  "olympic_year" INTEGER /* Year of the Olympic Games */,
  "event" TEXT /* Specific event for which the medals were awarded */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who won the medal */,
  "medal_type" TEXT /* Type of medal (Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  "medal_date" TEXT /* Date when the medal was awarded */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Number of gold medals won by the club */,
  "silver" INTEGER /* Number of silver medals won by the club */,
  "bronze" INTEGER /* Number of bronze medals won by the club */,
  "total_medals" INTEGER /* Total number of medals won by the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medal_counts_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medal_counts_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment entry */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the enrollment belongs to */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the enrollment numbers are recorded */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the athletes */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athletes */,
  "enrolled" INTEGER /* Number of athletes enrolled in the club */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the athletes were enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport in which the athlete participates */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the athlete belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Coach, Member) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object storing specific permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
